content: Phase 1.0: Integration playbook for Gemini (direct API + Emergent fallback)
Phase 1.1: Get Emergent Universal LLM key
Phase 1.2: Set up workspace dir + backend env vars + install deps
Phase 1.3: Implement engines (llm_gateway, build_engine, repair_engine, export_engine, snapshot_engine)
Phase 1.4: Write test_core.py POC (notes app full-stack generation + build + repair + export)
Phase 1.5: Run POC and fix until PASS (frontend dist/ + backend imports + clean ZIP)
Phase 2.0: Design pass for orchestrator cockpit UI
Phase 2.1: Backend - Mongo models + repos + state machine + all engines integration
Phase 2.2: Backend - API routes (projects, BRD, architecture, plan, generate, files, build, acceptance, export) + SSE event ledger
Phase 2.3: Frontend - cockpit shell + routing + API client + SSE hook
Phase 2.4: Frontend - 10 pages (Dashboard, NewProject, Cockpit, BRD, Architecture, Plan, Files, Build, Acceptance, Export)
Phase 2.5: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 covering all 10 user stories
